target_name: SolaceAGI Health — Response Time Check (Brendan Gregg Oracle)
context: Brendan Gregg USE method (q-agi-015): What is the response time for /health? Cloud Run cold starts add 2-5s latency. This test runs warm (no idle period) so should be <500ms. Verify: health endpoint responds fast, contains status:ok and version. If time_total > 1.0 the service may have cold start issues.
